working_tree: clean implementation commit during final profiling
protocol: Performance claims use two warm-up runs followed by five measured process runs per case. A separate same-revision pass verified one representative output per case with openpyxl. A preliminary cold/scan-affected performance pass is excluded from the recorded medians.
resource_metrics: Worksheet body pending-buffer high-water mark, flush count, temporary worksheet-part footprint, and active worksheet temporary-file count after successful close
scope: Single Windows/MSVC machine, two one-million-cell InlineString workloads, and DEFLATE levels 1/3/6. No cross-machine or arbitrary-workload claim.
